iso_timestamp_at_which_a_suspended_wait_: ISO timestamp at which a suspended wait will resume (long waits only)
max_5_minutes_300_seconds_enable_async_f: Max 5 minutes (300 seconds). Enable Async for up to 30 days.
pause_workflow_execution_for_a_time_inte: Pause workflow execution for a time interval
pauses_workflow_execution_for_a_specifie: Pauses workflow execution for a specified time interval. By default the wait runs in-process for up to 5 minutes. Enable Async to pause the run on disk and resume automatically for waits up to 30 days.
run_the_wait_asynchronously_to_allow_dur: Run the wait asynchronously to allow durations up to 30 days
status_of_the_wait_block_waiting_complet: Status of the wait block (waiting, completed, cancelled)
wait_duration_unit_when_async_is_off_sec: Wait duration unit when async is off (seconds or minutes)
wait_duration_unit_when_async_is_on_minu: Wait duration unit when async is on (minutes, hours, or days)
